test_cases.description: Verifies the skill uses whileInView with once:true for scroll-triggered animations
test_cases.input: Animate a features section so each card fades in as it scrolls into view

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill includes reduced motion support in animation implementations
test_cases.input: Add entrance animations to this component but make sure it respects accessibility preferences

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill correctly implements staggered children animations
test_cases.input: Create a list of testimonial cards that animate in one by one with a slight delay between each
